gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE T2.CPK < 250 AND (T3.KCT = '+' OR T3.RVVT = '+' OR T3.LAC = '+')
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.CPK < 250 AND (T2.KCT = '+' OR T2.RVVT = '+' OR T2.LAC = '+')
question: For the patients with a normal range of creatinine phosphokinase, how many of them have a positive measure of degree of coagulation?
